name: GaugeFlow P5 exact synthetic rank-three tensor-control gate v1
purpose: Before any learned tensor oracle or real piezoelectric evaluation, test whether the production geometry-only conditional flow can control an exactly recomputable rank-three SO(3)-equivariant property. The teacher is a synthetic control, not a constitutive or discovery claim.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: This synthetic gate neither changes historical thresholds nor restores real tensor-conditioned generation.

teacher.formula: T(X)=sum_{i->j}(a_j-a_i) exp(-r_ij/delta) n_ij outer n_ij outer n_ij
teacher.symmetry: translation/PBC/SO(3)-equivariant; symmetric in its final two indices

state.generated_subspace: fractional coordinates only; atom types and lattice metric are fixed known factors for this substrate-control experiment
state.common_noise: all four representatives of each tensor orbit reuse the same initial coordinate noise during sampling

decision_rule: Only if every pre-registered seed satisfies every criterion is the production conditional geometry path qualified for the P4 matched-backbone comparison. A pass does not qualify atom types, joint crystal generation, real piezoelectric tensors, an external oracle, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
